text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Sapporo Kinen—and Air Groove's
chance at a comeback—has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, the Empress, steps onto the track to
give a performance that meets the expectations
and hopes of her fans.
